# ZyncSpace Website Documentation

> AI-driven technology consulting and unified team workspace platform.

## Overview
ZyncSpace combines AI-driven technology consulting with a unified team workspace — chat, tasks, calendar, and AI in one platform.

## Main Pages

### Home
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/
- Description: AI consulting, software engineering, capabilities, framework, tech stack, and product showcase.

### Consulting Services
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/services
- Description: Technology consulting — AI automation, cloud engineering, UX, custom SaaS.

### Our Framework
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/services/framework
- Description: Consulting delivery framework and methodology.

### Technology Stack
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/services/technology
- Description: Software engineering toolchain and cloud platform standards.

### Industries
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/services/industries
- Description: Industry-specific consulting and platform solutions.

### Case Studies
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/services/case-studies
- Description: Client outcomes from consulting and engineering engagements.

### Consulting Pricing
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/services/pricing
- Description: Consulting engagement models and pricing.

### Features
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/features
- Description: Team workspace — chat, tasks, calendar, and AI.

### Use Cases
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/use-cases
- Description: How teams use ZyncSpace for collaboration.

### Pricing
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/pricing
- Description: Product pricing plans.

### About
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/about
- Description: Mission, team, and company story.

### Careers
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/careers
- Description: Open roles and culture.

### Contact
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/contact
- Description: Consulting, support, and partnership inquiries.

### Blog
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/blogs
- Description: Articles on AI, software engineering, communication, and productivity.

### Privacy Policy
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/privacy-policy
- Description: Data collection and privacy practices.

### Terms of Service
- URL: https://zyncspace.in/terms-of-service
- Description: Terms and conditions.
